title: Construction and Technical Department - About Us
content:
Construction and Technical Department - About Us

The duties of the Construction and Technical Department are as follows:

a) To make the projects of the university buildings and facilities, to prepare the tender files, to carry out the tenders related to the construction and repair, to control and receive the constructions, to carry out the maintenance and repair works,

b) To carry out similar works such as heating, boiler room, cold room, generator, ventilation systems and telephone exchange, landscaping and vehicle operation, elevator maintenance and repair.

This content was updated on 02/09/2024.
